name: Casa Italia

story.title: Sophisticated and casual styled furniture
story.description:
Inspired by Italian furniture brand style and the sophisticated of the name, the word 'Casa' derived from Italian or Spanish language means Home, House, or Space of Living.

Casa Italia naming represents a more sophisticated and casual brand identity and furniture product style.

It represents Unique, Distinctive, Familiar, Sense of Interior.
